title: amaryllis × reginioides
intro: Amaryllis × reginioides, also known as the Hippeastrum or Amaryllis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, particularly belladonna alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Amaryllis × reginioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried flowers, leaves, and roots, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and other medicinal products.
